name: stream-app
description: STREAM — ambient AE/FDE copilot + signal platform

scripts.dev:ambient: concurrently -n web,api,mac -c cyan,magenta,green "next dev" "tsx server/index.ts" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run build:ambient && electron ambient/dist/main.js"
scripts.dev:notch: concurrently -n api,ui,electron -c magenta,blue,green "tsx watch server/index.ts" "vite --config notch/vite.config.ts" "wait-on http://localhost:5174/central.html && npm run build:notch-electron && electron notch/dist-electron/electron/main.js"
scripts.dev:notch:live: concurrently -n api,ui,electron -c magenta,blue,green "SIMULATION_MODE=false NOTCH_PROTOTYPE=1 tsx watch server/index.ts" "SIMULATION_MODE=false vite --config notch/vite.config.ts" "wait-on http://localhost:5174/central.html && npm run build:notch-electron && SIMULATION_MODE=false NOTCH_PROTOTYPE=1 electron notch/dist-electron/electron/main.js"
scripts.restart:notch: npm run stop:notch && npm run dev:notch:live
scripts.dev:notch:demo: concurrently -n api,ui,electron -c magenta,blue,green "SIMULATION_MODE=true DEMO_MODE=1 tsx watch server/index.ts" "SIMULATION_MODE=true DEMO_MODE=1 vite --config notch/vite.config.ts" "wait-on http://localhost:5174/central.html && npm run build:notch-electron && SIMULATION_MODE=true DEMO_MODE=1 electron notch/dist-electron/electron/main.js"
scripts.build:notch: npm run build:notch-ui && npm run build:notch-electron
scripts.notch:mobile: npm run build:notch && SIMULATION_MODE=true electron notch/dist-electron/electron/main.js --mobile-only
scripts.dev:notch:live:stream: concurrently -n api,ui,electron,tunnel -c magenta,blue,green,yellow "SIMULATION_MODE=false NOTCH_PROTOTYPE=1 tsx watch server/index.ts" "SIMULATION_MODE=false vite --config notch/vite.config.ts" "wait-on http://localhost:5174/central.html && npm run build:notch-electron && SIMULATION_MODE=false NOTCH_PROTOTYPE=1 electron notch/dist-electron/electron/main.js" "wait-on http://localhost:3131 && npm run tunnel:api:prod"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('better-sqlite3')}catch(e){}" && (npm rebuild better-sqlite3 2>/dev/null; test -d node_modules/electron && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 2>/dev/null; true)
